title: Poison
overview: A couple is reunited years after tragedy drove them apart. Their brief but intense meeting will bring simmering pain and resentments to the surface but will be a reminder too of cherished intimacies and the love they once shared.

trailers.title: Désirée Nosbusch geht mit POSON - EINE LIEBESGESCHICHTE auf große Kinotour.
